data.title: Central Bank of Russia Signals Policy Shift With 2026 Stablecoin Feasibility Study
data.description:
On February 13, 2026, First Deputy Governor Vladimir Chistyukhin confirmed that the regulator will conduct a feasibility study in 2026 before presenting findings for public discussion. The decision to formally examine a national stablecoin marks a notable recalibration in the Central Bank of Russia’s digital asset strategy.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/central-bank-of-russia-signals-policy-shift-with-2026-stablecoin-feasibility-study/

data.title: Solana Co-Founder Anatoly Yakovenko's Wealth Tied to SOL Holdings
data.description:
An analysis report by Arkham has estimated the net worth of Solana co-founder Anatoly Yakovenko to be between $500 million and $1.2 billion. According to PANews, this wealth primarily stems from his holdings in SOL tokens and equity in Solana Labs, closely linked to the market price of Solana.

At Solana's inception, 500 million SOL tokens were minted, with 12.5% allocated to the founding team. It is widely speculated that the address 9QgXq is associated with Yakovenko, holding over 136,000 SOL. Between August and November 2024, this account unstaked and transferred over 3 million SOL, with more than 1.5 million restaked to a new address. If these addresses belong to Yakovenko, his SOL holdings are valued at approximately $122 million. Additionally, a domain associated with his username "Toly" holds about $16,500 in liquid assets.

Yakovenko owns approximately 5-10% equity in Solana Labs, which has received investments from firms like a16z, Polychain Capital, and Multicoin Capital. The company's valuation is estimated between $5 billion and $8 billion, making his equity worth around $250 million to $800 million. Furthermore, he has invested as an angel investor in over 40 projects within the Solana ecosystem, including Jito Labs, Drift Protocol, and Helius.

data.title: CEO Sentenced to 20 Years for $200 Million Bitcoin Ponzi Scheme
data.description: The CEO of Praetorian Group International has been sentenced to 20 years in prison for orchestrating a $200 million Bitcoin Ponzi scheme. According to NS3.AI, the fraudulent activities occurred between December 2019 and October 2021, affecting over 90,000 investors worldwide. This case underscores the persistent risks linked to cryptocurrency investment scams.

data.title: XT is about to launch BREM
data.description: XT.COM will soon list BREM and open the BREM/USDT trading pair in the Innovation Zone (Layer 1). The specific listing date will be announced separately. BREM is a blockchain-based utility token focused on building a multi-vendor voucher and membership benefits exchange market, connecting consumers and merchants across the ecosystem. Users can manage and redeem digital vouchers, gift cards, and membership benefits across different brands using a single wallet and token, enabling cross-platform value circulation.

data.title: Economists Warn of Potential Brain Drain in Israel Amid Rising Religious Nationalism
data.description: Economists are expressing concern over a possible irreversible brain drain in Israel, as the nation grapples with increasing religious nationalism and war fatigue. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the growing apprehension among experts about the long-term impact on the country's intellectual resources. The situation is exacerbated by the ongoing socio-political challenges, which may lead to a significant outflow of talent and expertise. This trend could have profound implications for Israel's economic and technological sectors, potentially hindering future growth and innovation. As the nation navigates these complex issues, the focus remains on finding solutions to retain its skilled workforce and maintain its competitive edge in the global arena.

data.title: Market Signals Indicate Potential Recovery Amid Meme Coin Decline
data.description:
On-chain data analysis platform Santiment has observed a significant shift in market sentiment as traders increasingly believe the 'Meme coin era' has ended. According to Odaily, this has led to what is described as a 'classic capitulation signal,' often seen as a contrarian indicator suggesting a market bottom may be near. Over the past 30 days, the total market capitalization of Meme coins has decreased by 34.04% to $31.02 billion.

Santiment also noted a prevailing pessimism on social media regarding the crypto market, with negative sentiment outweighing positive. This skepticism, even amid rising prices, is considered a healthy sign for a potential sustained market recovery. Analysts suggest that unlike previous broad-based altcoin rallies, the next market phase may be more selective, benefiting only certain cryptocurrencies.

data.title: MGBX will soon launch the Opinion (OPN) pre-market trading pair.
data.description: According to official news, MGBX will list Opinion (OPN) pre-market trading pair at 18:00 (SGT) on February 15, 2026. Deposit opening time: To be determined. Trading opening time: February 15, 2026, 18:00 (SGT). Withdrawal opening time: To be determined. Opinion is building a dynamic opinion and continuous prediction market, with its first product being AlphaOrBeta. These innovations will enable the evaluation of human opinions, thereby driving social exchange within the social network itself and ensuring that everyone's opinions are recognized and empowered in the digital realm.

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Stock Market Faces AI-Induced Sell-Off, Impacting Billionaire Rankings
data.description: Recently, the U.S. stock market has been experiencing a sell-off triggered by artificial intelligence developments. According to Jin10, sectors such as software and fintech have seen declines over the past week. This market movement has also affected the global billionaire rankings. The billionaire index from certain institutions indicates that Jensen Huang, CEO of chip giant Nvidia (NVDA.O), has fallen out of the top ten richest individuals worldwide. His wealth has decreased to approximately $151 billion, marking a reduction of over $3 billion since the beginning of the year.

data.title: AI Developments Highlighted by Jim Bianco
data.description: Jim Bianco, president of Bianco Research posted on X, discussing recent advancements in AI. He mentioned 'Co-work from Claude,' 'Claude for Excel,' and 'prompts for Claude for law.'

data.title: Jim Bianco Discusses Future Bitcoin Cycle
data.description: Jim Bianco, president of Bianco Research posted on X, shared insights on the upcoming Bitcoin cycle. He emphasized that the next cycle will be driven by 'replacement' rather than 'permission.' Bianco suggests that Bitcoin has the potential to replace existing systems, indicating a shift in how digital currencies might be integrated into the financial landscape. This perspective highlights the evolving role of Bitcoin in future economic cycles.

data.title: Santiment: Meme Coin has entered a "surrender period," and a bottoming-out rebound is imminent, but only some tokens will benefit.
data.description: On-chain data analytics platform Santiment stated that with traders widely believing "the era of Meme coin is over," the market is showing "classic capitulation signals," often a good time to look in the opposite direction. Santiment points out that when a sector of the market is completely pessimistic, it often indicates that a bottom is near. Data shows that Meme's total market capitalization has fallen 34.04% to $31.02 billion in the past 30 days. Santiment also observed that pessimism about the crypto market significantly outweighs optimism on social media; this phenomenon of "skepticism even as prices rise" is a healthy sign that the market may continue to recover. Analysts point out that unlike past altcoin seasons with widespread rallies, the next round of market activity may be more selective, with only a subset of cryptocurrencies benefiting.

data.title: El Salvador’s Bitcoin Holdings Shrink by $300 Million After Market Drop
data.description:
Key Takeaways: El Salvador holds 7,560 BTC worth about $508. 47 million at current prices.
source: https://coindoo.com/el-salvadors-bitcoin-holdings-shrink-by-300-million-after-market-drop/

data.title: Multicoin Capital: Supports redirecting all Aave product revenue to the DAO, and suggests phased disbursement with guaranteed transparency and optimization of the compensation model, among other things.
data.description: Vishal Kankani, Head of Investment at Multicoin Capital, stated in an article on the X platform that as a significant holder of AAVE, Multicoin Capital supports Aave Labs' proposal to redirect 100% of its product revenue to the DAO. Kankani believes this proposal is strategically significant, representing a step towards a clearer token-centric economic model. Regarding the details of the proposal, Multicoin Capital offers the following suggestions for improvement: Since the proposal involves approximately $25 million in stablecoins and 75,000 AAVE tokens (approximately $9 million), totaling about 25% to 30% of the national treasury, a phased allocation model should be adopted, linking funding deployment to specific launch milestones and revenue targets. Furthermore, the definition and verification mechanism for "100% revenue" should be clearly defined, and a transparent product-level reporting system should be established. Regarding incentive mechanisms, a compensation model linked to revenue should be established, rather than solely based on milestones. Additionally, Kankani requested that Aave Labs clarify whether it plans to launch non-branded products or operate other revenue streams outside the Aave brand in the future. Finally, Vishal Kankani pointed out that the issue of token value capture should be discussed in a subsequent proposal, and the current priority is to complete revenue alignment.

data.title: Alt5 Sigma transferred 75.8 million WLFI tokens, worth $8.02 million, to World Liberty Financial.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, today the WLFI treasury company Alt5 Sigma (Alt5 Sigma) transferred another 75.8 million WLFI tokens, worth $8.02 million, to World Liberty Financial (@worldlibertyfi).

data.title: U.S. Energy Secretary Announces Shift in Venezuelan Oil Revenue Management
data.description:
U.S. Energy Secretary Wright has announced a significant change in the management of Venezuelan oil revenues. According to Jin10, Wright stated that the funds from Venezuelan oil sales will no longer be deposited into an account in Qatar. Previously, the account in Qatar was under U.S. government control, with funds initially transferred there before being redirected to Venezuela. Wright revealed that a new account has been established within the U.S. Treasury, ensuring that the money will no longer flow to Qatar.

Wright also highlighted that the sales revenue from Venezuelan oil has already surpassed $1 billion. He mentioned that the U.S. has reached a short-term agreement with Venezuela to sell an additional $5 billion worth of crude oil in the coming months. So far, these oil shipments have been directed to refineries in the United States and Europe.

data.title: With the Oscars just around the corner, betting on numerous awards has begun on Polymarket, with over $15 million wagered on Best Picture.
data.description: With the 2026 Academy Awards just around the corner, betting on various awards is now open on Polymarket. The top picks are: Best Picture: *World War I & II* (75% odds); Best Actor: Timothée Chalamet (77% odds); Best Director: Paul Thomas Anderson (91% odds); Best Actress: Jessie Buckley (93% odds); Best Original Screenplay: *The Sinner* (84% odds); Best Supporting Actress: Teyana Taylor (72% odds); Best Supporting Actor: Stellan Skarsgård (67% odds); Best Documentary Feature: *The Perfect Neighbor* (65% odds); Best Original Score: *The Sinner* (87% odds).

data.title: Alt5 Sigma Transfers 75.8 Million WLFI Tokens to World Liberty Financial
data.description: Alt5 Sigma, a treasury company, has transferred 75.8 million WLFI tokens to World Liberty Financial. According to Foresight News, this transaction occurred 11 hours ago and is valued at approximately $8.02 million.

data.title: China to Implement Permanent Financial Support for Rural Revitalization
data.description: China is set to introduce a permanent financial support system aimed at promoting rural revitalization and preventing a return to poverty. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this strategic shift from temporary aid to sustained assistance. The initiative underscores China's commitment to long-term economic stability in rural areas, ensuring that progress made in poverty alleviation is maintained and further developed. This move is part of broader efforts to enhance rural development and improve living standards across the country.
